message: Added save-state tracking with unload/load warnings (only when polygons exist), and shrunk the Save/Load buttons.
Added “Save Tiling” and “Load Tiling” to Editor Controls and implemented JSON export/import with versioning.
Updated the documentation to follow the new linking requirements. All files now link from index.md, and each sub-page links back to it so nothing is orphaned.
